message:
feat(core): add enforce_run batch processing and diagnostic snapshot (ft-2p9cb.1.3.2)

RuntimeEnforcer.enforce_run(): batch-process CorrelationContext through enforcement.
RuntimeEnforcer.diagnostic_snapshot(): full diagnostic with per-stage enforcement state.
RuntimeEnforcerSnapshot: serializable snapshot combining enforcement + base enforcer state.
Timeout-based recovery: forced de-escalation when max_degraded_duration_us exceeded.
4 new tests (148 total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
